gist.headline: Comic books in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Comics Explorer just dropped into the app showcase. It's a clean, modern web interface for organizing and reading digital comic collections.
gist.summary: Added Comics Explorer to the community app showcase, introducing a modern web interface for organizing and visualizing digital comic collections.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use a new community-built tool for managing digital comics and interactive presentations.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee reading a comic book alongside the monitor robot displaying comic panels, set in a cozy greenhouse to represent the app showcase.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at colorful comic book panels displayed on the screen of a chunky retro monitor robot. They are sitting in a cozy digital greenhouse with lime green (#ecf874) code-plants sprouting from pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
